name: Hermes Agent
description: Delegate heavy tasks (terminal, browser, code execution) to a containerized Hermes Agent via ACP.

hermesContainerName.description: Docker container name for Hermes. Default: hermes-agent

hermesDataDir.description: Hermes data directory on host (mounted as /opt/data)

execEnvRootDir.description: Host root directory for task-scoped Hermes execution environments

runtimeExecEnvRootDir.description: Runtime-visible root directory for Hermes execution environments

projectionVersion.description: Stable projection version used for session binding and execenv manifests

defaultModel.description: Default LLM model for Hermes tasks

defaultContextLevel.description: Default context level for task dispatch

defaultCredentialScope.description: Default credential scope for task dispatch

defaultWriteback.description: Default writeback strategy for task dispatch

timeout.description: Default timeout in seconds for Hermes tasks. Default: 1800

autoStrategy.description: Enable automatic L/C/W strategy inference. Default: true

enableLayeredProtocol.description: Enable the layered dispatch protocol (L/C/W). When disabled, tasks are sent directly to Hermes without strategy inference, context assembly, or credential injection. Default: true

skillProjection.description: Controls which OpenClaw workspace skills are exposed to Hermes

execEnvCleanup.description: Cleanup policy for old projected execution environments

transport.description: Transport mode: tcp only. Hermes is expected behind the local ACP bridge.

tcpHost.description: TCP host for Hermes ACP bridge. Default: 127.0.0.1

tcpPort.description: TCP port for Hermes ACP bridge. Default: 3100

hermesContainerName.label: Container Name
hermesContainerName.help: Docker container name where Hermes Agent runs.

hermesDataDir.label: Data Directory
hermesDataDir.help: Host path to Hermes persistent data (config, memories, skills).

execEnvRootDir.label: ExecEnv Root
execEnvRootDir.help: Host path where the plugin writes task-scoped projected execution environments.

runtimeExecEnvRootDir.label: Runtime ExecEnv Root
runtimeExecEnvRootDir.help: Path visible from Hermes runtime for the same projected execution environments.

defaultModel.label: Default Model
defaultModel.help: LLM model Hermes uses for tasks. Can be overridden per dispatch.

autoStrategy.label: Auto Strategy
autoStrategy.help: When enabled, the plugin automatically determines context level, credential scope, and writeback strategy based on the task.

enableLayeredProtocol.label: Layered Protocol
enableLayeredProtocol.help: When enabled, uses the L/C/W layered dispatch protocol. When disabled, tasks are sent directly to Hermes without strategy, context, or credential processing.
